allow: PowerShell($adb='Z:\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe'; $booted=''; while \($booted -ne '1'\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $booted = \(& $adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null\).Trim\(\) }; Write-Host "fully booted")
